title: controller compatibility +
description: lets you play mine craft with a controller and more biomes
body:
controller compatibility+

summary: lets you play mine craft with a controller and more biomes

📖about/features📖

1. adds Biomes O' Plenty

2. adds all macaws decor for biomes of plenty and chest varits 

3. X-box controllers

4. Essential Mod for on device hosting

🌎biomes o plenty / macaws addons🌏

-Macaw's Bridges

-Macaw's Fences - Biomes O' Plenty

-Macaw's Fences and Walls

-Macaw's Furniture

-Macaw's Furnitures - Biomes O' Plenty

-Macaw's Roofs

-Macaw's Roofs - Biomes O' Plenty

-More Chests Variants - Biomes O' Plenty (MCV)
